summary: FPV drones were used to kill two Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions and to eliminate a Russian soldier who attempted to feign surrender before fleeing toward comrades. Ukrainian forces in the Kostiantynivka direction, 36th Marine Brigade, survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with a drone detector visible in footage indicating they were aware of the targeting. Russian operators from the "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 191 Ukrainian targets on April 13 and 193 on April 14, including fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, across multiple sectors including Donbas, Belgorod, Sumy, and Krasny Liman.
